rationale: Performs the documentation cleanup and version bump the PR body promises: `agents/prompt-engineer.md` line 193 renames `/refine` to `/raffina`; `commands/aiuto.md` line 114 drops the `via Ollama` clause from the strict-mode privacy row; `skills/privacy-routing/SKILL.md` line 68 strips `(Ollama o equivalente)` from the PRIVILEGIATO description. The 1.0.2 to 1.0.3 PATCH bump is applied uniformly across `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`, `bettercallclaude_italia/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`, `bettercallclaude_italia/package.json`, root `package.json`, `commands/versione.md` console output, and the README badge SVG URL. PR being in `negatives/closed-without-merge/` reflects a maintainer policy decision (likely combined into a larger release) rather than a defect in the diff itself.
